let Selector = require('../selector') class Fullscreen extends Selector { /** * Return different selectors depend on prefix */ prefixed(prefix) { if (prefix === '-webkit-') { return ':-webkit-full-screen' } if (prefix === '-moz-') { return ':-moz-full-screen' } return `:${prefix}fullscreen` } } Fullscreen.names = [':fullscreen'] module.exports = Fullscreen
